title: Lexpert recognizes McCarthy Tétrault Finance and M&A expertise in 2026 Special Edition publications
content:
## Lexpert recognizes McCarthy Tétrault Finance and M&A expertise in 2026 Special Edition publications
McCarthy Tétrault’s finance and mergers and acquisitions expertise has been recognized in Lexpert’ s newly released 2026 Special Edition: Finance and Special Edition: Mergers & Acquisitions publications. In total, 89 of our lawyers were recognized for their outstanding work advising Canadian and international clients on finance matters and complex, high‑stakes M&A transactions, with several professionals acknowledged in both publications.
The recognitions reflect our Firm’s strength in delivering sophisticated transactional advice across core areas, including banking and financial institutions, corporate commercial law, corporate finance and securities, mid‑market transactions, corporate tax, mergers and acquisitions, and private equity.
Beyond featuring leading practitioners, the publications also examine evolving market dynamics. In an interview with Lexpert , Jonathan See , Partner and Co-Head of the Firm’s M&A and Private Equity groups, highlights the shift toward higher-value, more complex transactions, driven by strategic buyers and sector consolidation, alongside a more selective private equity environment, pointing to continued opportunity and underlying strength in the Canadian M&A market.
Reflecting the Firm’s role in many of the market’s most significant transactions, we advised on several of the deals that have been shortlisted as “ Excellence Awardees ” up for transaction honours at the Canadian Law Awards gala on May 7.
Find out how our Banking & Financial Services , Capital Markets , and Mergers & Acquisitions teams can help you maximize opportunities and navigate your most important transactions.
The McCarthy Tétrault lawyers recognized are:

## Lexpert Special Edition: Finance
- Chrystelle Chevalier-Gagnon
- Laurence Cromp-Lapierre
- Marjolaine Hémond Hotte
- Jennifer F. Longhurst
- Robert J. Richardson
- Charles-Antoine Soulière

## Lexpert Special Edition – M&A
- Louis-Nicolas Boulanger
- Chrystelle Chevalier-Gagnon
- Laurence Cromp-Lapierre
- Louis-Charles Filiatrault
- Jennifer F. Longhurst
- Charles-Antoine Soulière

### About McCarthy Tétrault
McCarthy Tétrault LLP provides a broad range of legal services, providing strategic and industry-focused advice and solutions for Canadian and international interests. The Firm has substantial presence in Canada’s major commercial centres as well as in New York City and London.
Built on an integrated approach to the practice of law and delivery of innovative client services, the Firm brings its legal talent, industry insight and practice experience to help clients achieve the results that are important to them.
For further information, or to request an interview with a McCarthy Tétrault lawyer, please contact: media@mccarthy.ca
